case_title: BRYAN WEISBARD VS. PINE-GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LP

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEISBARD, BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT PINE-GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-08-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-08-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT BRYAN WEISBARD. DEFENDANT PINE-GOUGH ASSOCIATES,LP IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CHRIS HOFF GENERAL MANAGER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON DEFENDANT. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT JOYCE BURRIS PROPTERY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY WEISBARD, BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT PINE-GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO JOYES BURRIS, 1777 PINE STREET SAN FRANCISCO CA. 94109
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PINE-GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISBARD, BRYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINE-GOUGH ASSOCIATES, LP $40.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $105.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
